text: What indication does an EPIRB give on activation?

options.text: Voice prompt saying EPIRB is activated
Strobe lights or flashes on top of the EPIRB
Gives out a printout of distress message sent

explanation: EPIRBs are required to have a visual indicator, typically a flashing strobe light, which assists rescuers in locating the unit during nighttime or low-visibility operations.
